data.title: Update onboarding structural marker tests to assert Phase 0.5 doc-folder scan markers in SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5, instruction files (SKILL.md) are tested at their structural boundary via grep checks on section headers and key content markers. The existing test-onboarding-skill.sh and test-onboarding-confidence-assignment.sh must be updated to assert the new Phase 0.5 markers that T6 will add to SKILL.md.

## What to Build
Add to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh`:

1. test_doc_folder_param_documented: SKILL.md must contain "--doc-folder" text describing the parameter
   - grep for "--doc-folder" in SKILL.md
2. test_phase_zero_five_section_present: SKILL.md must contain a Phase 0.5 section (or equivalent Doc-Folder Scan phase heading)
   - grep for "Phase 0.5" or "Doc-Folder Scan" (case-insensitive)
3. test_file_type_guard_skip_documented: SKILL.md must document skip behavior for binary/large files with logging
   - grep for "SKIP:" and "binary" in same section, or "file-type guard"
4. test_scan_docs_invocation_documented: SKILL.md must reference the scan-docs.sh helper script invocation
   - grep for "scan-docs.sh" in SKILL.md
5. test_confidence_elevation_only_rule_documented: SKILL.md Phase 0.5 must document elevation-only rule for CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT updates
   - grep for "elevat" (matches "elevate", "elevation") near "confidence" in SKILL.md

These tests run RED (fail) until T6 adds Phase 0.5 to SKILL.md. Add RED marker [test_doc_folder_param_documented] to .test-index for plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md.

## TDD Requirement
These tests run RED before T6 adds Phase 0.5. After T6, all 5 new tests pass.
Run: `bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh`

## Test Approach
- Given: SKILL.md is read from plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- When: grep patterns are applied for Phase 0.5 structural markers
- Then: patterns found / not found determines pass/fail

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test-onboarding-skill.sh contains all 5 new Phase 0.5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_doc_folder_param_documented\|test_phase_zero_five_section_present\|test_file_type_guard_skip_documented\|test_scan_docs_invocation_documented\|test_confidence_elevation_only_rule_documented' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] New tests fail before T6 (RED — Phase 0.5 not yet in SKILL.md)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
- [ ] RED marker [test_doc_folder_param_documented] added to .test-index for plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_doc_folder_param_documented\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All previously passing tests in test-onboarding-skill.sh continue to pass (no regression)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -v 'test_doc_folder\|test_phase_zero_five\|test_file_type_guard\|test_scan_docs_invocation\|test_confidence_elevation' | grep -v FAIL
